name: Nano Brows
description: Tiny, hair-like strokes placed with a digital needle to fill, shape, and define your brows naturally. Great for sparse or uneven brows, built to last 1 to 3 years.
ideal: All skin types, even mature skin. The most natural looking technique, hyper realistic hairstrokes.

name: Powder Brows
description: A soft, filled-in brow technique using a stippling method to create an airbrushed, powdery finish. Ideal for clients with too much previous pigment in the skin, where nano brow hairstrokes would not show the natural skin gaps between strokes. Often used as a color correction to neutralize old work and restore a clean, defined shape.
ideal: Previous microblading, excess pigment buildup, or color correction

name: Lip Blush
tagline: Color that stays. Liner that doesn't.
description: Lip blush is a soft cosmetic tattoo that enhances your natural lip shape and restores healthy color. It can redefine the Cupid's bow, add natural pigment to faded lips, and reduce the pale "white halo" that can make lips appear smaller or less defined. Lip blush pairs beautifully with lip filler and can also help neutralize darker or uneven lip tones for a balanced, natural look.
ideal: Anyone whose lips blend in with their skin

name: Lash Line Enhancement
description: Pigment placed right between the lashes to make them look fuller and more defined. Unlike eyeliner, it sits within the lash line and is virtually undetectable. Natural, effortless definition every day without looking made up.
ideal: Those who want subtle, natural definition

name: Eyeliner
description: Pigment applied on top of the lash line for a more visible, dramatic liner look. Can include a subtle wing for a classic, defined finish. Unlike lash line enhancement, eyeliner is meant to be seen and gives you that polished liner look every single day.
ideal: Those who want a defined, liner look with optional wing

name: Saline Removal
description: Saline solution is tattooed over existing permanent makeup to lift and lighten unwanted pigment. A safe, effective option for correcting old work before a new service.
ideal: Removing or fading previous permanent makeup
